calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Off Calendar

Devault Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Thomas Best, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Stanford Bigsby, Jr., and Lillie B. Bigsby.
Plaintiff's witness: Stanford Bigsby, Jr., was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Willis Bigsby as follows:
Principal $42,880.00
Total of $42,880.00
Judgment signed in open court.
